items.title: It can be both. Clearly the front office has not been effective.
items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
It can be both. Clearly the front office has not been effective. 

But ownership and the operating chair have committed most of the unforced errors that fans rail the hardest against: hiring TSpoon before hiring a GM, suspending Angel Reese, allowing facility delays to disrupt a whole season.

items.title: Interpersonal tension is interesting, but I think the thing getting missed in all of the discussion around the Diggins situation is the fact that the Sky committed to FOUR injured players (two who are 35+) in free agency.

Interpersonal tension is interesting, but I think the thing getting missed in all of the discussion around the Diggins situation is the fact that the Sky committed to FOUR injured players (two who are 35+) in free agency.

The Rickea injury was a genuine tragedy, but how was this supposed to work?

items.title: Hollander POTD Spud Webb. NC St PG drafted in 85 by DET but was cut & landed w/ATL where he was bench spark plug. Famous for winning 86 dunk contest but also a legit good player, peaking at 16 ppg in 91-92. Great FT shooter too (85% career, led NBA in 94-95). Retired in 98.

items.author: Julia Poe
items.body_excerpt:
The Chicago Sky are open to making changes at the August trade deadline.

But despite recent tension with Skylar Diggins — who sat out again last night — sources say the Sky have no current plans to shop the guard for a trade.
